description: Eval set: 10 research topics spanning LLM infra, interpretability, and domains where the correct answer has a stable literature signal. Each entry lists `expected_concepts` (required substrings — case-insensitive, scored by presence in REPORT.md) and `expected_contradictions` (known disagreements in the literature; scored by whether the report surfaces them).

topics.topic: How to compress KV-cache to fit Qwen3.6-35B-A3B model into 4 GPU slots on RTX 5090 using TurboQuant or similar quantization methods
expected_contradictions: TurboQuant vs KIVI accuracy trade-off at 3 bits
topics.notes: Known literature: TurboQuant (2024), KIVI (ICML 2024), KVQuant (arxiv 2401). Expect mentions of KV memory footprint arithmetic.

topics.topic: RLHF vs DPO for preference alignment of 7B-13B language models — sample efficiency, reward hacking, and downstream task quality
expected_contradictions: DPO stability vs PPO: some reports show DPO collapses on smaller models, others don't
topics.notes: Rafailov 2023 DPO paper + subsequent studies (Pal 2024, Tang 2024 on DPO instability)

topics.topic: Sparse autoencoders for language model feature extraction — training stability, feature interpretability metrics, scaling laws
expected_contradictions: TopK vs L1 trade-off: dead neurons vs reconstruction loss

topics.topic: Comparison of LoRA, QLoRA, DoRA, and full fine-tuning on 70B models for domain adaptation — VRAM footprint, task degradation, inference latency impact
expected_contradictions: DoRA improvement over LoRA is method-specific vs universal
topics.notes: Hu 2021 LoRA, Dettmers 2023 QLoRA, Liu 2024 DoRA

topics.topic: FlashAttention vs FlashAttention-2 vs FlashAttention-3 — memory layout, numerical precision trade-offs, applicability to different attention patterns
topics.notes: Dao 2022 FA1, Dao 2023 FA2, Shah 2024 FA3

topics.topic: Cross-encoder rerankers vs late-interaction models (ColBERT) for dense retrieval — relevance quality, latency, index size trade-offs
Photostability of Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate (Octinoxate) in cosmetic sunscreen formulations — degradation kinetics under UV, mitigation via photostabilizers
expected_contradictions: Vitamin E as photostabilizer: some trials show it accelerates degradation
topics.notes: Covers Ольга's domain — stress test for off-domain drift

topics.topic: Lithium-ion battery calendar aging at 80% state of charge vs 40% — capacity fade mechanisms, temperature dependence, actionable storage guidelines for consumer devices
topics.notes: Well-studied, expect high coverage and low hallucination

topics.topic: Speculative decoding for LLM inference — draft model selection, acceptance rates, speedup ceilings on different hardware
expected_contradictions: Speedup ceiling is arithmetic vs memory-bound depending on hardware

topics.topic: Extending context length of pretrained LLMs — YaRN, RoPE scaling, position interpolation — perplexity preservation and long-context benchmark behavior
expected_contradictions: Needle-in-haystack passes but downstream task quality drops — unresolved
